description_long: This is a potted Phalaenopsis orchid with elegant white flowers arranged along a gently arching green stem. The flowers have broad, overlapping petals with a central yellow and brown column, characteristic of the orchid family. The plant is set in a small, ribbed white pot, and several large, glossy green leaves emerge from the base, spreading outward. The petals display a bilateral symmetry, with three larger outer petals and three inner petals, including a distinct lip. The overall appearance is delicate and ornamental, making it suitable for indoor or outdoor decorative use in urban environments. The pot and plant together create a visually striking and realistic representation of a cultivated orchid.
description: A potted white Phalaenopsis orchid with broad, overlapping petals and large green leaves in a ribbed white pot. The arching stem displays several elegant, symmetrical flowers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face of the orchid flowers, the central column, and the spread of green leaves around the white pot.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the arching stem and the layered arrangement of the flowers, with leaves extending to the right.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the flowers and the curvature of the stem, with leaves fanning out from the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the stem's arc and the profile of the flowers, with the pot and leaves visible from a different angle.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged bilaterally, with three larger outer petals and three inner petals including a prominent labellum (lip), overlapping slightly and forming a symmetrical, layered display typical of Phalaenopsis orchids.
